title: Compact Diamonds
description: No need to carry too many shulkers because you happen to be too rich. Just pack them together into a Compact Block of Diamond.
body:
_Does your server have a diamond-based economy? Is your server dealing with large transactions? Are you tired of carrying so many diamonds?_ **Well you're in luck!** **Compact Diamonds** is a simple yet very useful Data Pack that adds a new item called "Compact Block of Diamond", crafted with 9 Blocks of Diamond and easily uncrafted in the inventory crafting menu. The **Compact Block of Diamond** can be carried in stacks of 64 or placed on the ground ### One Compact Block of Diamond is the equivalent to 81 diamonds. # How to install? ## Vanilla [Datapack]: 1. Download the latest [release for vanilla](https://modrinth.com/datapack/compact-diamonds?loader=datapack#download). 2. Open Minecraft. 3. Select the world you want to install the data pack for, click on "Edit", then "Open world folder". > ### ⚠ Server note: > For a server, simply find the folder in the server called "world". 4. Open the folder named `datapacks`, and put the datapack into it. The datapack should be a `.zip` file. 5. If you are in the world during the installation, type `/reload` (if you have enabled cheats) or press `F3`+`T`. 6. If the datapack was installed correctly, it should be enabled in the world. If you have enabled cheats, you can verify by typing `/datapack list enabled` and find an entry named `[file/Compact-Diamonds.zip]`. 7. If it doesn't work then reload Minecraft. 8. If it still doesn't work then just search on the internet. ## Modded [Fabric / Quilt / Forge / NeoForge] 1. Download the latest [release for modded](https://modrinth.com/datapack/compact-diamonds?loader=neoforge#download). 2. Locate your `mods` folder. Often located in `%appdata%\.minecraft\mods` or `~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/mods`. 3. Put the Compact Diamonds `.jar` in the `mods` folder. 4. If Minecraft is open, please restart it for Compact Diamonds to load. > ### ⚠ Fabric / Quilt note: > **FabricAPI** (or specifically `fabric-resource-loader-v0`) is required for the `.jar` to load. ## Plugin [Paper / Purpur] > ⚠ Plugin support is very experimental 1. Download the latest [release for plugin](https://modrinth.com/datapack/compact-diamonds?loader=paper#download). 2. Locate your `plugins` folder. 3. Put the Compact Diamonds `.jar` in the `plugins` folder. 4. If Minecraft is open, please restart it for Compact Diamonds to load.
Dev Info: Compact Block of Diamond can be translated using the key block.compact_diamonds.compact_diamond_block, fallback is "Compact Block of Diamond".

If you want to change the texture of the Compact Block of Diamond without also changing the normal Diamond Block, you can use Compact-Diamonds-Custom-Model-Template .

All repositories related to Compact Diamonds:
**I'm currently working on on making translations for this datapack, I'd love some help.**
